filter_reason: Substantive practitioner writeup (danluu.com) on agentic test processes, LLM benchmarks, and agentic coding - exactly the production-lessons-from-running-agents material the stream wants, despite low HN points.
summary: Dan Luu published notes from Galapagos on agentic coding in practice, covering how they structure test processes around agents and what LLM benchmarks do and don't predict about real coding work. Dan Luu's writeups are known for rigorous, data-grounded engineering analysis rather than hype. Useful ground truth for anyone deploying coding agents in a real codebase.
title: Agentic test processes, LLM benchmarks, notes on agentic coding from Galapagos
